creator: girgen@FreeBSD.org
text:
the original report rings a bit like it would be an rc-script bug.

What I saw was that ifconfig didn't work at all. don't remeber exact wording of error messages, and machines are in production now, so I can't really test it on them. It works fine for an older machine with 1gbit bce, but the 10gbit bxe failed.
